keys.description: The `/api/v1/me` bootstrap payload for one User. Includes profile + roles + permissions + features + terminology + tenant memberships. Warmed on login; invalidated on any Profile / TenantMember / Role mutation for the User.
invalidatedBy: AccessRoleObserver.updated (from access module — role permission set changed)

keys.description: One Profile row (unredacted). Cached briefly (30s) because Profile updates are rare + reads are frequent (avatar + display_name are on every page).
All TenantMember rows for one User. Read by `/me/tenants` + by the tenant switcher SPA widget.
The active tenant ULID for THIS session. Written by the tenant-switch endpoint; read by `user.resolve_active_tenant` middleware. Long TTL (24h) matches the Sanctum PAT idle timeout.
Redis SET keyed by membership_id, values are the latest `last_active_at` timestamp seen in this batch window. Flushed to DB by UpdateLastActiveJob every 60s.
Fan-out invalidation marker. Written when any of the User's cached data mutates — downstream modules (access, ai) subscribe to this key + drop their own caches on change.
Soft-deleted User rows keyed by ULID + their `hard_delete_scheduled_for` timestamp. Read by the scheduler to know which rows to hand to PurgeErasedUsersJob.
